sentryPage.testHint: Sends a tagged test exception. Requires ADMIN_PROVISION_SECRET. Never commit a real DSN.

smsPage.queueHint: Processes due SCHEDULED SMS rows through the real pipeline (log or live). Failures stay SCHEDULED.
smsPage.cronNote: No background worker is running in-app. Point a Liara cron at POST /api/admin/sms/process-scheduled with x-admin-secret when you want automatic flushes.

contact.title: Contact us

legal.aboutIntro: inbox is an online sports booking platform that connects athletes with clubs and coaches.
legal.pricingIntro: On inbox, sports service prices are set by clubs or coaches. This page explains what costs you may owe.
legal.complaintsIntro: If you are unhappy with inbox or the booking process, you can submit a complaint using the channels below.
legal.cancellationIntro: This page explains general cancellation and refund rules on inbox. Each club’s exact window is shown on that club’s booking page.
legal.disclaimer: This document is provided for transparency. Clubs operating on inbox may have additional policies. For legal advice specific to your jurisdiction, consult qualified counsel.
legal.privacyIntro: inbox (“we”, “us”) operates a sports court and coach booking platform. This policy explains what personal data we collect, why we use it, and the choices you have.
legal.termsIntro: By creating an account or making a booking through inbox, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

aboutSections.title: 1. Who we are
paragraphs: inbox provides software for discovering clubs, booking courts, and (when enabled) coach sessions.
The platform operator is responsible for the software, accounts, and technical support; each club independently operates its facilities and on-site services.

aboutSections.title: 2. What we offer
paragraphs: Club discovery, available capacity, online reservations, booking status tracking, and owner tools for clubs.
Payment is currently usually “pay at club” unless otherwise stated.

aboutSections.title: 3. Transparency and trust
paragraphs: Slot prices appear on the club/booking page. Club cancellation rules are visible before you confirm.
Use the site footer links for contact, complaints, platform pricing, and terms.

pricingSections.title: 1. Athlete pricing
paragraphs: Court, coach, and package prices are set by the club or coach and shown on the relevant page.
Before you confirm, a cost summary (service amount + platform fee if any + total due) is displayed.
We do not currently charge a separate athlete platform fee at checkout; the shown amount is what you pay at the club unless stated otherwise.

pricingSections.title: 2. Extra costs
paragraphs: Equipment, extra guests, or other on-site services apply only if the club announces them in the booking flow or on site.
Taxes or lawful surcharges, when applicable, follow the club’s disclosure.

pricingSections.title: 3. Club commercial terms
paragraphs: Club commercial terms (free pilot, subscription, or commission) are agreed separately with inbox and do not change athlete booking prices unless explicitly stated.
For club partnership inquiries, contact support{'@'}inboxs.ir.

pricingSections.title: 4. Payment
paragraphs: Default method: pay on arrival at the club. Online gateway payment is announced separately if enabled.
Wallet credit applies only to amounts recorded as deposits/refunds in the system.

complaintsSections.title: 1. How to complain
paragraphs: Complaints email: complaints{'@'}inboxs.ir — use subject “Complaint” and include booking ID, date, and a description.
You may also email support{'@'}inboxs.ir or use the contact page.
Support mobile: 09124777927

complaintsSections.title: 2. What we review
paragraphs: Platform technical issues, price/slot display errors, account access, and follow-up on bookings recorded in inbox.
On-site service quality, facilities, or cash disputes should first go to the club; inbox can help escalate when needed.

complaintsSections.title: 3. Response time
paragraphs: We aim for an initial reply within 3 business days. Complex cases may take longer.
Outcomes are shared by email or SMS when a phone number is available.

cancellationSections.title: 1. Cancellation window
paragraphs: Each club sets its own cancellation and reschedule window; it is shown on that club’s booking page.
Cancellations after the window may be refused or incur penalties/non-refund per club policy.

cancellationSections.title: 2. Unpaid (pay-at-club) bookings
paragraphs: If you have not paid at the club yet, an on-time cancellation usually releases the slot with no charge.
No-shows without cancellation may limit future bookings per club rules.

cancellationSections.title: 3. Paid bookings or wallet credit
paragraphs: On-time cancellation of a booking marked paid in the system usually credits your inbox wallet unless club or payment-provider rules require otherwise.
If online gateway payment is enabled, refunds may follow the provider’s rules.

cancellationSections.title: 4. Packages and season bookings
paragraphs: Package or recurring reservations may have stricter rules stated in the package terms or club agreement.

cancellationSections.title: 5. Disputes
paragraphs: Start with the club; for platform follow-up use the complaints page or support{'@'}inboxs.ir.

privacySections.title: 1. Who we are
paragraphs: inbox provides software that connects athletes with sports clubs and coaches for court and session reservations.
Each club listed on inbox is an independent operator responsible for its facilities, staff, pricing, and on-site policies.

privacySections.title: 2. Information we collect
paragraphs: Account data: name, email address, phone number, preferred language, and password (stored as a one-way hash).
Booking data: club, court or coach, date and time, guest details you provide, equipment selections, comments, and booking status.
Payment records: when pay-at-club is enabled, we store payment method and status metadata supplied by the club or athlete; we do not store full card numbers.
Communications: password-reset requests, in-app notifications, and optional SMS or email logs initiated by clubs.
Technical data: server logs, IP address, browser type, and error reports when error tracking is enabled.

privacySections.title: 3. How we use your data
paragraphs: To create and manage your account and authenticate sessions.
To process, display, and modify reservations you or your club make.
To send transactional messages such as booking confirmations, password resets, and waitlist alerts when delivery is enabled.
To help clubs manage contacts, finance summaries, and operational dashboards.
To maintain platform security, prevent abuse, and improve reliability.

privacySections.title: 4. Legal bases and sharing
paragraphs: We process data to perform our contract with you (providing the booking service) and, where applicable, based on legitimate interests in operating a secure platform.
We share booking and contact details with the club and coach involved in your reservation so they can deliver the service.
We do not sell personal data. We may use infrastructure providers (hosting, database, error monitoring) who process data on our instructions.
We may disclose information when required by law or to protect the rights and safety of users and clubs.

privacySections.title: 5. Retention
paragraphs: Account and booking records are kept while your account is active and for a reasonable period afterward for legal, accounting, and dispute-resolution purposes.
Clubs may retain their own copies of booking and payment records according to their internal policies.
Server logs and error reports are retained for a limited operational period unless a longer period is required for investigation.

privacySections.title: 6. Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on applicable law, you may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction of your personal data.
You can update profile information from your athlete dashboard. For other requests, contact us using the details below.
You may withdraw consent for optional communications where consent is the legal basis.

privacySections.title: 7. Security
paragraphs: We use industry-standard measures including encrypted sessions, hashed passwords, role-based access controls, and rate limiting on authentication endpoints.
No online service is completely secure. Please use a strong, unique password and notify us if you suspect unauthorized access.

privacySections.title: 8. Children
paragraphs: inbox is not directed at children under 13. Accounts for minors should be created and supervised by a parent or guardian where required by local law.

privacySections.title: 9. International transfers
paragraphs: Your data may be processed on servers located outside your country. We take steps to ensure appropriate safeguards where transfers occur.

privacySections.title: 10. Changes and contact
paragraphs: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.
Questions or privacy requests: privacy{'@'}inboxs.ir

termsSections.title: 1. Acceptance
paragraphs: These terms govern your use of the inbox website and applications. By registering, logging in, or booking, you accept these terms and our Privacy Policy.

termsSections.title: 2. The service
paragraphs: inbox is a booking and club-management platform. We facilitate discovery, reservation, and communication between athletes, coaches, and clubs.
We do not own or operate sports facilities unless explicitly stated. Clubs are solely responsible for court availability, coaching quality, safety, and on-site rules.

termsSections.title: 3. Accounts
paragraphs: Athletes may self-register. Coach and club-owner accounts are created by invitation or admin provisioning.
You must provide accurate information and keep your credentials confidential. You are responsible for activity under your account.
We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or applicable law.

termsSections.title: 4. Bookings
paragraphs: A booking is confirmed when the platform displays a confirmed status. Availability shown online is subject to change by the club.
Rescheduling and cancellation options depend on booking type, timing, and club policy. Some owner-initiated season or package reservations create recurring slots on the club calendar.
Waitlist entries do not guarantee a slot until a booking is confirmed.

termsSections.title: 5. Cancellation and refunds
paragraphs: Each club’s cancellation and reschedule window is shown on the booking page and applies in addition to these terms.
Unpaid pay-at-club bookings: an on-time cancellation usually frees the slot with no charge.
Paid bookings or wallet credit: on-time cancellation usually credits your inbox wallet unless club or gateway rules require otherwise.
Full details are on the Cancellation & refunds page and the Complaints page.

termsSections.title: 6. Payments
paragraphs: Unless online payment is explicitly enabled for your club, payment is made at the club (“pay at club”). inbox may record payment method and status for operational tracking.
Prices, taxes, refunds, and receipts are determined by the club unless otherwise stated at checkout.
When online payments are enabled in the future, additional payment-provider terms may apply.
Before you confirm a booking, the service amount and total due are shown clearly. Athlete platform fees are currently zero unless stated otherwise.

termsSections.title: 7. Club policies
paragraphs: Each club may publish cancellation windows, no-show rules, equipment fees, and conduct requirements. Club rules apply in addition to these terms.
Disputes about service quality, refunds, or facility conditions should first be directed to the relevant club.

termsSections.title: 8. Acceptable use
paragraphs: You may not misuse the platform, attempt unauthorized access, scrape data at scale, interfere with other users, or provide false booking information.
Club staff must use owner tools only for legitimate club operations and comply with applicable messaging and privacy laws when contacting athletes.

termsSections.title: 9. Intellectual property
paragraphs: inbox branding, software, and content we provide are protected by applicable intellectual-property laws. You receive a limited license to use the service for personal or authorized club purposes.

termsSections.title: 10. Disclaimers and liability
paragraphs: The service is provided “as is” to the extent permitted by law. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access or that every listing is error-free.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, inbox is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from club services, injuries at facilities, or third-party actions.
Nothing in these terms limits liability where such limitation is prohibited by law.

termsSections.title: 11. Changes
paragraphs: We may modify these terms. Continued use after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

termsSections.title: 12. Governing law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws applicable to the operator of inbox in its principal place of business, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Courts with competent jurisdiction may hear disputes unless mandatory consumer protections require otherwise.

termsSections.title: 13. Contact
paragraphs: Support and legal inquiries: support{'@'}inboxs.ir
Complaints: complaints{'@'}inboxs.ir — or the Complaints page on the site.

auth.roleTitle: How do you want to join Inbox?

auth.otpVerifyFailed: Could not verify the code. Please try again.

auth.phoneTaken: This number is already registered. Please sign in.
auth.phoneLoginHint: Sign in with your mobile number and SMS code.
auth.emailPasswordHint: Sign in with your email and password.
auth.emailOrPhonePasswordHint: Sign in with your mobile number or email and password.
auth.ownerPasswordHint: For provisioned accounts with email and password. Primary sign-in is phone OTP.
auth.ownerPhoneRegisterHint: Club owners register with mobile number and SMS code.
auth.name: Name
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.athleteOnlyNote: Self-registration is for athletes. Coaches and club owners are invited separately.
auth.dashboardLoadFailed: Login succeeded, but loading your dashboard failed. Please refresh and try again.
auth.resetPreferPhoneHint: Preferred sign-in: mobile number and SMS code. Email reset is optional.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link will be sent. If no email arrives, sign in with phone and SMS code.
auth.resetEmailLogMode: Request recorded, but email delivery is not enabled. Sign in with phone and SMS code instead.
auth.resetRequestFailed: Could not process request. Please try again.
auth.useGoogle: This account uses Google sign-in. Please use the Google button.
auth.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

owner.calendarSubtitle: Stay organized and track court availability for {date}
owner.legendHint: Slot colors follow the same soft scheduling style as the calendar.
owner.quickNotesBody: Select free slots → Reserve (walk-in). On unpaid bookings, tap Mark paid (cash). Use Mark unpaid to reverse a mistaken cash mark. Cancel frees the court.
owner.setupSubtitle: Complete your club profile, hours, courts, and pricing. Coaches are optional.
owner.setupNoCoachHint: Coach setup is not required to appear in the catalog or accept court bookings.
owner.setupCourtsHint: You need at least one court with a price greater than zero.
owner.setupValidationProfile: Name (FA/EN), address, and valid open/close hours are required.
owner.setupValidationCourts: Add at least one court with a price greater than zero.
owner.setupValidationPrice: Court price must be greater than zero.
owner.setupNotBookable: Club is not ready for public booking yet. Check profile, hours, and courts.
owner.guestRequired: Guest name, family name, and mobile are required.

errors.slotInPast: This time slot has already passed and cannot be reserved.
errors.startDateInPast: Start date cannot be in the past.

reserveRedirect.title: Reserve from calendar
reserveRedirect.body: Season and package reservations are created from a slot on the owner calendar. Open the calendar, tap a slot, then choose the reserve option you need.

financePage.subtitle: Collected cash vs still unpaid (pay at club).
financePage.paymentBreakdownHint: Percent of active bookings by collection status.
financePage.chartEmpty: No collected revenue for the past 7 days yet.
financePage.payoutsPlaceholder: Payout account configuration will be available in a future release.
financePage.payoutsPayAtClub: Pay-at-club mode: guests pay at the desk. Online payouts are not used.

packagesPage.title: Title
packagesPage.dateRangeInvalid: Finish date must be on or after start date
packagesPage.scheduleRequired: Set session times for at least one selected weekday

crmPage.name: Name
crmPage.logOnlyNote: This flow only records a campaign log / dry-run. It does not send a real SMS to phones.
crmPage.liveNote: Live SMS is enabled. Messages are sent/queued through the gateway (not dry-run).
crmPage.remindersInfo: Reminder rules are shown here for visibility only. Automated delivery is not active in this MVP.

settingsPage.imageUrlHint: Paste a public https:// image link (recommended 800×600 or larger).
settingsPage.staffAccessHint: Manage dashboard login access for invited coaches and managers — separate from on-site workers.
settingsPage.ownerPermissionsReadonly: Owners have full access and cannot be edited here.
settingsPage.sessionDurationsHint: Choose allowed session lengths. The default drives the calendar slot grid.
settingsPage.basePriceHint: Default price for hours without a custom time band.
settingsPage.pricingTimelineHint: Set different prices for peak or quiet hours.
settingsPage.pricingTimelineEmpty: Only the base price applies. Add a time band for specific hours.
settingsPage.lastSecondDiscountHint: Apply this discount when a booking is made within the hours before start.
settingsPage.offPeakDiscountHint: Apply this discount during quiet hours on listed slot prices.
settingsPage.workersSectionHint: Keep an on-site staff roster with contact details, shifts, and responsibilities. Workers are hired in person — no platform login.

workersPage.subtitle: Add club workers hired on-site. This is separate from coaches, who are invited to the platform.
workersPage.coachesNote: Coaches (مربی) are invited separately. Workers (کارکنان) are recorded here for your internal roster only.
workersPage.accessAreasHint: Which club areas this worker handles on-site (not dashboard login).
workersPage.confirmDelete: Remove this worker from the roster?

supportPage.calendarHelp: Use the owner calendar to create, update, and cancel court reservations. Closed slots are hidden from direct reserve actions.
supportPage.paymentHelp: Finance shows saved reservation and payment records. Payment state is informational unless a reservation is updated from the calendar.
supportPage.crmHelp: CRM campaigns and reminders are visible in the dashboard, but outbound SMS is currently dry-run / log-only and is not delivered to real phones.
supportPage.crmHelpLive: CRM campaigns and reminders are visible in the dashboard. Outbound SMS is live: messages are sent/queued through the gateway when you push a campaign.
supportPage.contactNote: These contacts come from the active club profile. Add or update them in the data layer before exposing more advanced support tooling.

seasonPage.selectWeekdays: Select weekdays to set session times
